title: Flower Tweaks
description: Adds the ability to craft and crossbread for flowers and grass
body: # Flower Tweaks Datapack *Enhance your Minecraft experience with Flower Tweaks, a datapack designed to transform the way you interact with flora in the game! No more tedious flower hunts - now you can craft your favorite blossoms with a simple combination of items.* ## Crafting Recipe Example: Bonemeal + Flower = 3 Flowers ![Dandelion](https://i.ibb.co/Wf0Bwxf/dandelion.png%20https://i.ibb.co/h8W3z8m/fern.png%20https://i.ibb.co/2Y3mGV5/grass-recipe.png%20https://i.ibb.co/zxQ8K6r/poppy.png) ![fern](https://i.ibb.co/h8W3z8m/fern.png) ![grass](https://i.ibb.co/2Y3mGV5/grass-recipe.png) ![poppy](https://i.ibb.co/zxQ8K6r/poppy.png) ### How to Use: 1. Download the Flower Tweaks Datapack. 2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save. 3. Start crafting and watch your Minecraft landscapes bloom with vibrant colors! ### Compatibility: - No additional dependencies required. ### Explore a World of Color: Immerse yourself in a world where flowers are just a craft away. Whether you're a seasoned builder or a casual player, Flower Tweaks adds a delightful touch to your Minecraft adventures. Craft, decorate, and let your creativity flourish! **Download Flower Tweaks now and experience the beauty of crafted blooms in Minecraft!**
